narrative: OMX30 opens into a mixed macro environment. Global equity selloff overnight, particularly in US growth (NASDAQ -2.21%), has created headwinds despite a structurally bullish OMX30 technical setup (+7.2% vs 200-MA, MACD above signal). The broad negative correlation coefficient (-0.551%) and declining risk appetite (VIX -1.44% but still 19.2) argue for caution. However, USD/SEK strength (+1.55%) and maintained bull market regime provide some offset for large-cap exporters. Weak ADX (5.8) reduces conviction; mean reversion risk builds with Stochastic K at 70.8. Net: Watch for opening weakness followed by potential consolidation rather than follow-through selling.
morningBrief: OMX30 likely opens flat to -0.3% as overnight US weakness (NASDAQ -221bp, S&P -144bp) meets resilient Nordic technicals. Bull regime intact (+7.2% vs 200-MA) but ADX 5.8 signals low trending conviction—expect range-trading around 3120–3150. USD/SEK +155bp is a tailwind for Volvo B, Atlas Copco A, Ericsson B; use any dip as accumulation for exporters. Oil weakness (-196bp) removes pressure from industrials. Banks face yield headwind (10Y -27bp) but NIM compression is gradual. Watch SEB A and Handelsbanken A for support at yesterday's close. Avoid overextension into overbought Stochastic (K=70.8); take profits on rallies into 3150. Key event: US Jobless Claims 14:30 CET—watch for surprise weakness to confirm risk-off tone.
drivers: Broad equity weakness led by NASDAQ (-2.21%), S&P 500 (-1.44%); DAX (-0.80%) signals European risk-off
USD/SEK strength (+1.55%) supports major exporters but offset by negative correlation signal (-0.551%)
Oil (-1.96%) and gold (-0.76%) decline reduce commodity tailwinds; yields down 27bp suggests growth concerns

sectorImpacts.reason: USD/SEK +155bp supports exports but oil -196bp eases input-cost pressure. Net: modest positive for margin profile.
US 10Y yield -27bp to 4.451% compresses NIM expectations; risk-off sentiment adds deposit pressure.
NASDAQ -221bp overnight signals broad tech sentiment decay. Ericsson B particularly vulnerable to growth narrative shift.
Gold -76bp and copper -13bp reduce commodity tailwinds. Boliden defensive exposure to broad selloff but lacks upside catalyst today.
Oil weakness (-196bp) offers minor relief but risk-off sentiment and weak EUR/USD (-65bp) argue caution on discretionary.
Yield decline (-27bp) supports property valuations. Refinancing cost fears ease as rate-cut expectations build.
Risk-off environment typically rotates capital toward defensive names; AstraZeneca and Essity B attract safe-haven flows.

watchList.reason: USD/SEK +155bp is direct tailwind for export order flow. Support at 3090, resistance 3150. Buy any intraday dip.
NASDAQ -221bp overnight and tech rotation into defensive names. If OMX30 breaks below 3110, Ericsson likely tests 65 SEK support.
Yield -27bp headwind, but stock has support at 11.80. Watch for capitulation below that on NIM concern. Fair value near 11.95 today.
Defensive rotation should lift pharma. Risk-off into 3100 OMX30 could trigger 5–7% outperformance. Add on relative weakness.
Copper -13bp and gold -76bp remove upside catalysts. Watch for technical bounce if OMX30 stabilizes. Fair value neutral from here.

econCalendarAlert: US Jobless Claims at 14:30 CET (prior 235k, consensus 240k)—market very sensitive; miss lower = risk-on reset, miss higher = extend selloff. No major Swedish economic releases today.
topRisk: NASDAQ support break at 14,600 could trigger cascade selling into OMX30 via correlation unwind. VIX 19.2 still relatively benign but rising risk-off into US data could spike volatility to 22–24 band, pressure all equities.
technicalSummary: Bull market regime intact: +7.2% vs 200-MA, MACD above signal (positive convexity)
ADX 5.8 (weak trend, confidence -30%) limits conviction; expect choppy consolidation not directional trending
Stochastic K=70.8, D=80.6 signals overbought risk; mean reversion likely into 3110–3120 before any new highs
RSI 52.03 neutral; no extreme condition but upper-half Bollinger %B=0.62 suggests upside pressure exhausted near term
52W 90% of range, -2.4% from high suggests limited room to run; downside to 3050 offers 0.7% margin of safety
